issue: 2-of-2 attesters = zero Byzantine fault tolerance; full-quorum collusion fabricates orders and drains all balances; keys co-located on one Hetzner box make this a single-host compromise
action: n>=3 honest-majority threshold, independently custodied keys, prioritize SP1 proven path
verification: Foundry test: fabricate BatchFill with unsigned victim trader, 2 attester sigs; settleBatchAttested succeeds today

issue: Owner can instantly setAttesters([self],1) or set a fake SP1 verifier and drain custody; no timelock/multisig
action: timelock + multisig owner for setAttesters/setSp1Verifier
verification: check deployed owner is not an EOA

issue: Single global batchNonce serializes every instrument/instance; concurrent quorums race, loser's signatures permanently invalid AFTER peers pruned (order loss)
action: per-instrument (or per-instance) batchNonce mapping, instrument in BATCH_TYPEHASH
verification: Foundry test: two batches different instruments land in either order

issue: One global attester set cannot express per-instance operator sets; instance #2 operators gain signing power over instance #1 books; no boot-time on-chain/env consistency check
action: per-instrument attester sets keyed from registry; operators fail closed on env/chain mismatch
verification: boot with wrong peer list against anvil refuses to start

issue: /clob/propose unauthenticated AND outside the rate limiter (merge does not propagate layers): anyone strands orders via co-sign-induced prune + free match_epoch CPU; module doc claims rate limiter bounds this — false
action: proposer signature over (epoch,batch_nonce,fills_hash) verified in attest; move limiter to top-level layer on merged app
verification: unauthenticated WireProposal then re-submit its orders -> 409 settled today; >capacity posts never 429

issue: Finality cluster: prune+settled fires on co-sign not on observed settlement; settled/cancelled/pool in-memory only; no anti-entropy after restart -> censored-veto deadlock at 2-of-2 (half of epochs dead)
action: key settled on on-chain receipt/filled reads; persist pool/settled/cancelled; pool-sync on boot and on Censored
verification: kill+restart node A mid-flow; A-led epochs settle

issue: settleRedemptionAttested lets quorum substitute for holder with no work proof; colluding issuer+quorum burn holder credit for nothing
action: bind messagesHash/usage commitment into receipt or holder-challenge window
verification: Foundry test: quorum settles redemption servedTokens=qty, holder lot consumed, no payout

issue: _applyBatch all-or-nothing + verify_proposal is stateless (no balance/collateral/lot/cancelled/expiry chain reads) -> attacker queues crossing buy, withdraws balance pre-submit, whole epoch reverts; repeatable every epoch
action: pre-simulate fills before co-sign/submit and drop doomed ones, or skip-and-emit per fill on-chain
verification: e2e: withdraw buyer balance before submit; batch lost today

issue: Serial peer attestation collection (5s timeout each) + WireProposal carries full order set (~4.5MB at MAX_POOL, over axum 2MB default body limit) -> quorum latency O(peers), liveness cliff ~4-5k orders
action: parallel collection with round deadline; digest-list proposals with pull-missing
verification: e2e with 6k pooled orders settles; black-holed peer bounds round at single timeout

issue: Malformed SURPLUS_CLOB_OPERATORS silently disables consensus (boots green, never participates; 2-of-2 peer also stops settling); silent range fallbacks throughout config
action: fail-closed config parsing; ERROR logs on substituted values
verification: boot with typo'd address -> non-zero exit

issue: Zero metrics: quorum failures, gossip loss, epoch lag, outbox depth observable only via journalctl grep; batches-stopped looks identical to no-flow
action: /metrics with epochs_run, quorum_failures, attestations_refused{verdict}, pool_size, batches_submitted, submit_reverts
verification: kill one operator in staging; alert within 2 epochs

issue: Mixed HTTP/mesh fleet partitions asymmetrically: mesh nodes fan out only on mesh, HTTP-led epochs systematically vetoed Censored; no negotiation or mismatch warning
action: fleet-level transport parameter + dual-write during migration; ERROR on peer unreachable N epochs
verification: 1 mesh + 1 HTTP node e2e; both nodes' led epochs settle

issue: Test gaps: NotLotHolder/ZeroAmount/ServedExceedsRequested never exercised; zero fuzz/invariant tests (solvency invariant unpinned); quorum only happy 2-of-3; partial default and resold-lot lifecycle dark
action: revert test per error per call site; forge invariant suite for solvency + collateralization
verification: forge coverage hits every revert line

issue: Live proof never verifies the peer co-signed (prints attested 2-of-2 unconditionally; passes under threshold=1 misconfig); e2e-firm-buy.mjs has no assertions after RFQ
action: decode settle tx calldata, assert sigs>=2 recovering to both operators; port balance/lot assertions into firm-buy
verification: rerun against 1-of-2 anvil; script fails

issue: ServeRequest replay window = full TTL (<=1h) across restarts (used_auths in-memory); servedTokens is issuer-asserted; receipt binds no work commitment
action: persist used_auths; bind messagesHash+usage into receipt; shorten TTL
verification: restart operator, replay captured ServeRequest -> serves again today

issue: settleBatchProven public values omit batchNonce; replay blocked only by filled-cap semantics
action: commit batchNonce in SP1 public values before real verifier
verification: review zk program commitments

issue: match_epoch/verify_proposal don't filter expiry; malicious proposer includes near-expiry order, peers co-sign, on-chain OrderExpired reverts whole batch
action: expiry horizon as explicit match_epoch input checked in verify_proposal
verification: consensus test: expired order in proposal -> refuse

issue: Venue god-object: 7 mutexes, lock order documented for one pair only; clob.rs is 5 components in 1000 lines; matcher depends on full settlement crate for one type
action: split clob into pool/driver/submit/http; move SignedOrder to settlement-core; document lock lattice
verification: cargo tree -p surplus-matcher clean; clob.rs <300 lines

issue: Dependency hygiene: blueprint-sdk requested alpha.6 resolved alpha.8 (floating alphas); core2 patched to git branch no rev; mesh.rs couples to upstream private wire encoding (silent partition on dep bump)
action: exact-pin all blueprint-* deps; rev-pin core2; round-trip decode test guarding the bincode workaround
verification: cargo update --dry-run proposes no blueprint-* movement

issue: Docs contradict reality: roadmap footer says 'not yet live' against checked live gates; shared-clob.md has two opposite status lines; G7 rate-limit claim false for /clob; README counts stale
action: docs sweep; CI-derived counts or remove
verification: one status line per doc; G7 claim matches curl test

issue: Hardcoded constants (EXPIRY_MARGIN 30s, MAX_POOL 10k, ATTEST_TIMEOUT 8s) unchecked against tunable epoch_secs (>=2 allowed, overlapping rounds)
action: derive attest timeout from epoch_secs or validate; document in spec
verification: boot EPOCH_SECS=2 rejected or timeout scales

issue: Persistent live trader keys in predictable /tmp paths; event filters take first BatchSettled without fillsHash filter
action: XDG state dir + ownership check; filter events by computed digest
verification: pre-created world-readable keyfile aborts

issue: Orders with u64 values > i64::MAX settleable via settleFills but silently unmatchable via CLOB (domain divergence)
action: document or reject at admission with explicit error
verification: admission test with huge qty returns explicit reject

issue: PRODUCT: buyer funnel = gas + mint/bridge + approve + deposit + order sig before first credit, then per-consumption requestRedemption tx + ServeRequest sig bound to exact message bytes + receipt sig — no streaming, no multi-turn without re-signing, signer in the inference hot path; competitor baseline is card + API key
action: API-key-against-lot consumption rail (operator issues key, serves OpenAI-compat, receipts settle lazily in background batches); one-signature buy via permit2/4337; sponsor gas
verification: funnel step count: target buy<=2 interactions, consume=0 wallet interactions per request

issue: PRODUCT/ECONOMICS: instance-payer persona unmodeled — feeRecipient is global, BSM is a 49-line stub; whoever requests/pays for instance #N earns nothing from its flow; operator-consortium self-funding is the only viable model and nothing supports multi-party instance requests
action: decide instance economics (consortium self-fund vs platform-funded vs sponsor with per-instance fee share); per-instance fee routing in contract redesign alongside C3/C4
verification: economics doc + fee routing test

issue: PRODUCT: operator onboarding = owner-gated setAttesters (permissionless operators cannot join quorum), 33 env vars, hand-copied systemd units, manual gas topups, no metrics, debugging via journalctl — pre-alpha ops experience; same key is attester+tx+mesh identity
action: operator runbook + venue@.service template + config file; registry-driven attester membership; key role separation
verification: a third party stands up an operator from docs alone in <1h without owner intervention beyond registry
